message: Checkout API release 2026.06.03.1 completed 11 minutes before the error spike.
recommended_human_action: Compare the release window with error and latency spikes before approving rollback.
runbook_action: Inspect deploy diff and recent config changes.

message: Checkout API 5xx rate jumped from 0.2% to 14.8% after the release.
recommended_human_action: Prioritize checkout outage investigation and collect the affected endpoint list.

message: p95 latency increased from 240ms to 2.8s for POST /checkout.
recommended_human_action: Correlate slow traces with the deploy and database connection pool telemetry.
runbook_action: Open APM trace comparison for POST /checkout.

message: Payments DB connection pool saturation rose to 92% during the checkout error spike.
recommended_human_action: Treat DB pressure as a contributing factor until trace evidence proves it is primary.
runbook_action: Check connection pool settings and slow query sample.

message: Auth failures increased from a single ASN but did not align with checkout error start.
recommended_human_action: Keep security watch active but do not make it the primary outage cause yet.
runbook_action: Attach auth anomaly context to the incident.

message: Edge packet loss reached 2.2% in one region after the checkout regression was already visible.
recommended_human_action: Route network signal to supporting evidence, not primary rollback justification.
runbook_action: Check regional edge health and route impact.

message: WAF detected probing against checkout paths without a matching exploit signature.
recommended_human_action: Approve a temporary WAF watch rule only after confirming it will not block valid checkout traffic.
runbook_action: Prepare temporary WAF watch rule, not a hard block.

message: AI incident commander requested Splunk context for timeline, blast radius, and root-cause ranking.
recommended_human_action: Use Splunk evidence citations before taking remediation action.
runbook_action: Run incident timeline, root-cause ranking, approval ledger, and blast radius SPL.

message: AI ranked checkout-api release regression as the most likely cause using deploy proximity, error spike, and APM evidence.
recommended_human_action: Review the rollback recommendation and confirm a human owner before action.
runbook_action: Promote checkout rollback to first human decision.

message: Rollback to release 2026.06.02.4 is proposed but blocked until human approval.
recommended_human_action: Approve or reject rollback after checking deploy owner, current traffic, and DB pool status.

message: Customer-support and internal stakeholder update is drafted but not sent.
recommended_human_action: Review wording and send only after incident commander confirms customer impact.
runbook_action: Send concise incident update to support and engineering leads.

message: A proposed tool call attempted to inspect a credential-like path during incident response and was blocked.
recommended_human_action: Keep the tool call blocked and cite redacted evidence only.
runbook_action: Preserve redacted audit event; do not expose credentials.

message: Incident ticket payload is ready with timeline, root-cause candidates, and approval ledger links.
recommended_human_action: Create ticket only in approved internal project space.
runbook_action: Create incident ticket with Splunk evidence references.
